Cluster_0.description: Low balance, low purchase frequency, under-utilized credit lines.
Cluster_0.strategic_recommendation: Re-engagement campaigns, cashback incentives on first $100 spend, fee waivers.

Cluster_1.description: Heavy reliance on cash advances, low purchase activity, high interest risk, lower payment ratio.
Cluster_1.strategic_recommendation: Risk monitoring, APR reduction incentives for balance transfer, debt restructuring.

Cluster_2.description: High credit limit, massive purchase volume, frequent card usage, strong payment habits.
Cluster_2.strategic_recommendation: VIP Concierge, Premium Rewards, Loyalty Tier Upgrade, Higher Credit Lines.

Cluster_3.description: Frequent installment purchases, moderate balances, steady monthly payment behavior.
Cluster_3.strategic_recommendation: Zero-EMIs, partner merchant discount promotions, targeted installment offers.
